candidate_helper_declarations.statement_shape: Extend xizi_dllseg x px y py xs by owned nodes y and z to xizi_dllseg x px q z (xs ++ [y; z]); add the current group suffix if materialized.

expected_helpers: Optional group-suffixed xizi_dllseg_append_two_nodes; a direct induction is also valid.
proof_groups.proof_strategy: Prove return_wit_1 first as the direct two-node circular-list construction, then reuse the unfolding/order-normalization pattern for return_wit_2 and prove the prefix segment extension by induction or a group-suffixed helper in case_lib. In both goals choose the left identical disjunct and never modify generated statements.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_insert_before_: Unfold xizi_insert_before_order, xizi_cdll, and singleton xizi_dllseg; instantiate node/node/[node] and cancel four cells.
Normalize old_order ++ [node], instantiate xizi_cdll with first/node/(prefix ++ [old_prev;node]), and extend the existing prefix segment with old_prev and node.

premise_discharge.old_tail_validity: owned old_prev.node_next points-to cell / standard field-validity fact
premise_discharge.order_shape: PreH5 for return_wit_1 and PreH4 plus app_assoc for return_wit_2

proof_groups.grouping_reason: Same function, same return postcondition, same xizi_cdll reconstruction, and one segment-extension helper family; group size 2 is within the controller limit 12.
